nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Zoothera
nodes.summary: Zoothera（Zoothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如长尾地鸫、四川淡背地鸫、Geomalia等21种鸟类。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Guadalcanal thrush
nodes.summary: The Guadalcanal thrush (Zoothera turipavae) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Guadalcanal thrush (Zoothera turipavae) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.

nodes.name: 动物界
